user.title: Polskie Obligacje Skarbowe
user.description: Enter the bond series code, quantity and optional purchase date. Add one entry per bond position.

data.quantity: Quantity (number of bonds; each = 100 PLN nominal)

data_description.series: Bond type prefix + 4 digits: MM (maturity month) + YY (maturity year). Examples: EDO0130, COI0430, OTS0726.
data_description.purchase_date: Leave empty to estimate from the series code (defaults to 1st of the purchase month).

abort.already_configured: This bond position is already being tracked.

error.series_invalid: Invalid series code. Format: TYPE + 4 digits, e.g. EDO0130, COI0430, ROR0427. Supported types: OTS ROR DOR TOS TOZ COI ROS EDO ROD.
error.quantity_invalid: Quantity must be a whole number ≥ 1.
error.date_invalid: Invalid date. Use YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2020-01-15.
